payload: {"description": "Add /api/health/startup-log endpoint with ring buffer for startup events", "priority": "medium"}
critique: solo audit — peer unavailable (DB unreachable from sandbox). Self-review score: 4/5. Both changes are correct and well-scoped. The startup-log endpoint uses a fixed-size ring buffer (Pitfall #12 compliant). The whale_score field fix closes a real Pitfall #18 gap.
